scripts.gemma:stats: cat local-agent/lib/meta/gemma-stats.json 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const c=d.computed;const s=d.system;console.log('Articles: '+d.articles+'/'+d.loops+' ('+c.successRate+' success)');console.log('Avg gen: '+c.avgGenSec+'s | Rate: '+c.articlesPerHour+'/hr');console.log('Fails: parse='+d.parseFails+' ollama='+d.ollamaFails+' skip='+d.skipped);console.log('CPU: '+s.loadPct+' ('+s.loadAvg1m+') | RAM: '+s.memUsedPct+' ('+s.memFreeGb+'G free)');console.log('Uptime: '+c.uptimeHuman);if(d.recentArticles[0])console.log('Last: '+d.recentArticles[0].title+' ('+d.recentArticles[0].genSec.toFixed(1)+'s)')" || echo 'No stats yet. Run npm run gemma first.'
scripts.gemma:logs: ls -t local-agent/lib/agent/logs/gemma-*.json 2>/dev/null | head -10 | while read f; do node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf8'));const t=d.parsed?.title||'-';const o=d.outcome;const g=(d.timing?.genSec||0).toFixed(1);console.log(require('path').basename('$f')+' | '+o+' | '+t+' | '+g+'s')"; done || echo 'No logs yet.'
scripts.gemma:log:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),dir='local-agent/lib/agent/logs';const f=process.argv[1]||fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(x=>x.startsWith('gemma-')).sort().pop();if(!f){console.log('No logs');process.exit()}const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(dir,f),'utf8'));console.log('=== '+f+' ===');console.log('Outcome:',d.outcome);console.log('Task:',d.task?.taskType,'|',d.task?.topic?.name);console.log('Gen time:',d.timing?.genSec?.toFixed(1)+'s','| Total:',d.timing?.totalSec?.toFixed(1)+'s');console.log('System:','CPU',d.system?.loadPct,'RAM',d.system?.memUsedPct);if(d.parsed){console.log('
--- PARSED ---');console.log('Title:',d.parsed.title);console.log('Type:',d.parsed.type,'| Field:',d.parsed.field);console.log('Sections:',d.parsed.sections?.map(s=>s.title).join(', '));console.log('See also:',d.parsed.seeAlso?.join(', '));console.log('Refs:',d.parsed.references?.length)}if(d.prompt){console.log('
--- PROMPT (first 500 chars) ---');console.log(d.prompt.slice(0,500))}if(d.rawOutput){console.log('
--- RAW OUTPUT (first 800 chars) ---');console.log(d.rawOutput.slice(0,800))}if(d.error)console.log('
ERROR:',d.error)"
